reasoning: The document shows significant content and visual failures. concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section

Specifically, the technical configuration lists for 'SSIDs' (detailing hidden/broadcast status) and 'VLANs & Subnets' (detailing VLAN IDs 210 and 410) are omitted from the text and table elements. While the diagram is provided as an image, its alt-text summary ('Includes details on SSIDs and VLANs') is insufficient as it omits the actual data values. These missing labels and data points constitute approximatel

This represents a catastrophic loss of visual organization and informational flow, as the core purpose of the document (the diagram) is gone, leaving only the peripheral text and footer table.
